km.Devon, England: ដិវ៉ុន, ប្រទេសអង់គ្លេស

zh.lifeSummary: Sir William Paul Godisford於1205年出生在英國英格蘭戴文。他與Susannah of Devon結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1287年享年82歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir William Paul Godisford于1205年出生在英国英格兰戴文。他与Susannah of Devon结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1287年享年82岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old Norse, originally a byname meaning ‘bride, wife’; in mythology the name of Thor's golden-haired wife.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: Paul
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Paulus, a Roman family name, originally a nickname meaning ‘small’, used in the post-classical period as a given name. Pre-eminently this is the name of the saint who is generally regarded, with St Peter , as co-founder of the Christian Church. Born in Tarsus, and originally named Saul, he was both a Roman citizen and a Jew, and at first found employment as a minor official persecuting Christians. He was converted to Christianity by a vision of Christ while on the road to Damascus, and thereafter undertook extensive missionary journeys, converting people, especially Gentiles, to Christianity all over the eastern Mediterranean. His preaching aroused considerable official hostility, and eventually he was beheaded at Rome in about ad 65 . He is the author of the fourteen epistles to churches and individuals which form part of the New Testament. It has been in continuous use in the British Isles since the 16th century.

variants.name: Paulus
meanings: From Latin Paulus, a Roman family name, originally a nickname meaning ‘small’, used in the post-classical period as a given name. Pre-eminently this is the name of the saint who is generally regarded, with St Peter , as co-founder of the Christian Church. Born in Tarsus, and originally named Saul, he was both a Roman citizen and a Jew, and at first found employment as a minor official persecuting Christians. He was converted to Christianity by a vision of Christ while on the road to Damascus, and thereafter undertook extensive missionary journeys, converting people, especially Gentiles, to Christianity all over the eastern Mediterranean. His preaching aroused considerable official hostility, and eventually he was beheaded at Rome in about ad 65 . He is the author of the fourteen epistles to churches and individuals which form part of the New Testament. It has been in continuous use in the British Isles since the 16th century.

en.lifeSummary: Sir William Paul Godisford was born in 1205, in Devon, England, United Kingdom. He married Susannah of Devon. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1287, at the age of 82.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir William Paul Godisford est né en 1205, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a épousé Susannah of Devon. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1287, à l’âge de 82 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Sir William Paul Godisford wurde 1205 in Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren. Er hat Susannah of Devon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1287 im Alter von 82 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Sir William Paul Godisford è nato il nel 1205 nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lui sposato Susannah of Devon. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1287, all'età di 82 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Paul Godisfordは1205年にイギリスイギリスデボンで生まれた。Susannah of Devonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1287年に82歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Paul Godisford(은)는 1205년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 태어났다. 그는 Susannah of Devon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1287년 82세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sir William Paul Godisford nasceu em 1205, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele casou-se com Susannah of Devon. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1287, com 82 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir William Paul Godisford родился в 1205 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания. Он женился на женщине по имени Susannah of Devon. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1287 г. в возрасте 82 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Sir William Paul Godisford nació en 1205, en Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Se casó con Susannah of Devon. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1287, a la edad de 82 años.
